crypto_key_name.description: Resource name of the regional CMEK key.
crypto_key_name.rationale: Encrypts data with an approved customer-managed key.

location.description: Region to which the CMEK policy applies.
location.rationale: Ensures CMEK is enforced in approved regions.

labels.description: Labels as key value pairs. Example: `{ "owner": "Bob", "department": "finance", "purpose": "testing" }`. **Note**: This field is non-authoritative, and will only manage the labels present in your configuration. Please refer to the field `effective_labels` for all of the labels present on the resource.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
